prompt: Generate an IR remote file for a generic Samsung TV — generate only, do NOT deploy
response:
Done — generic Samsung TV IR remote generated (Samsung32 protocol, address `07 00 00 00`). Not deployed to the Flipper.

Commands included in the preview: Power, Vol_up, Vol_dn, Mute, Ch_up (and more below the truncation — full numpad, nav, menu, input, etc.).

Want me to:
- Deploy it to `/ext/infrared/` now?
- Show the full contents first?
- Tweak (add/remove buttons, different protocol)?

input.description: Generic Samsung TV remote with all common commands: power, volume up/down, channel up/down, mute, input/source, menu, navigation (up/down/left/right/ok), back/exit, home, number keys 0-9
